## Description
<!-- A clear and concise description of the feature you'd like to see. -->

## Use Case / Motivation
<!-- Describe the problem you're trying to solve or the use case this feature would enable. -->

## Proposed Solution
<!-- Describe how you think this should work. Be as specific as possible. -->

## Alternatives (Optional)
<!-- Have you considered any alternative solutions or workarounds? -->

<!-- We love community contributions! Let us know if you'd like to build this. -->
